scope: wave2 fan-out migration: 3 of legacy's 4 read streams (users, media, stories) at capability parity; user_insights is blocked (ENGINE_GAP — see docs.md's Known limits) and stays on the legacy implementation until a Tier-2 hook wave revisits it

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: legacy's user_insights mapper hoists the LAST element of the raw values[] array onto flat value/end_time fields and conditionally synthesizes a derived id (name+end_time) only when the raw record has no native id; the computed_fields dialect has no array-index/last-element accessor (dotted record paths only walk object-map keys) and no conditional fallback-if-absent expression, so this cannot be expressed in Tier 1, and Tier-2 hooks are out of scope for this wave per the wave2 fan-out hard rules. See docs.md.
destructive media deletion, not a syncable read
